languages.text: {n}Нунциус с неимоверным усилием ловит руку техножреца.{/n} "Эо...ганн... Просто... отпус...ти..."
{n}Nuncius seizes the Tech-Priest's hand with immense effort.{/n} "Eo... gunn... Just... let... me... go..."

languages.text: {n}Nuncius sujeta con inmensa dificultad la mano del tecnosacerdote.{/n} «Eo... gunn... Deje... que... me... vaya...».

languages.text: {n}努恩修斯竭尽全力，抓住了那位技术神甫的手。{/n}“伊奥……贡……让……我……走……”
languages.original_text: {n}Nuncius seizes the Tech-Priest's hand with immense effort.{/n} "Eo... gunn... Just... let... me... go..."

languages.text: {n}Nuncius attrape les mains du technoprêtre au prix d'un immense effort.{/n} « Eo... gunn... Laisse... moi... partir... »

languages.text: {n}Nuncius, büyük bir çabayla Tekno Rahip'in elini yakalıyor.{/n} "Eo... Gunn... Lütfen... Bırak... Beni..."

languages.text: {n}Nuncius greift unter großer Anstrengung nach der Hand des Techpriesters.{/n} "Eo... gunn ... Lasst ... mich ... einfach ... gehen ..."

languages.text: {n}ヌンキウスは、渾身の力で技術司祭の手をつかむ。{/n}「エオ……ガン……ただ……私を……逝かせて……くれ……」
